title: Twilio & Monday Integration: Are you looking for a way to streamline your lead communication in Monday.com?
excerpt:
By using the Make (formerly Integromat) platform, you can easily connect your Monday.com account with Twilio and start sending SMS messages to your leads directly from the Updates section of each item on your board. 
Not…

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
By using the Make (formerly Integromat) platform, you can easily connect your Monday.com account with Twilio and start sending SMS messages to your leads directly from the Updates section of each item on your board.

Not only can you send messages, but you can also receive replies in the same Updates section, making it a simple and efficient way to communicate back and forth with your leads.

But don’t just take our word for it. Try it out for yourself and see how the Twilio integration can revolutionize your lead communication in Monday.com.

And if you need any help or guidance along the way, don’t hesitate to reach out to us through our Calendly link or by visiting our website

We would be happy to assist you in implementing this integration for your team. So, don’t wait – start streamlining your lead communication today with the Twilio integration in Monday.com!

MSquare Support
Visit us here
Youtube Channel

posts.author: Carrie (Carrie Downey)
posts.cookedHtml: Do the SMS messages come from the user’s individual mobile number or do they need to be assigned a new phone number for this to work?

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Carrie

Since we follow Whatsapp API, we cannot use the whatsapp in our mobile. We have to use a cloud whatsapp.
For SMS, we can easily do with any SMS service. For more details, send an email to support@msquare.pro
